summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive refs are routed to central security handling; closed PRs are kept closed; the remaining open PRs are retained for maintainer review or independent follow-up rather than close/merge actions.

actions.reason: Open useful contributor PR in the same Spark OAuth routing family; keep related for maintainer review, with no close or merge planned in plan mode.
